chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P No.D-1242 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 26.03.2025 Petitioner is present in person Mr. Shoukat Ali Rahimoon advocate a/w respondent No.7/Mayor M.C Mirpurkhas (Abdul Rauf) Mr. Kanji Mal Meghwar, advocate for CEO HESCO Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper, Assistant A.G Sindh <>*<> Pursuant to Order dated 12.03.2025 respondent No.7 is present and submits that he has already increased the water supply to petitioner from 03 to 4 tankers per week (16 per month). In this regard he has placed on record acknowledgment receipt, duly signed by the petitioner. Petitioner, who appears in person, submits that Order dated 18.11.2024 has not been complied with in its letter and spirit, as the tankers are being supplied irregularly. Counsel for the respondent No.7 assures the supply of water tankers to the petitioner in terms of Order dated 18.11.2024, however, that will be subject to availability of water. During the month of December and January of each calendar year, there is a shortage of water due to the closure (Bandi) of Canals and in such circumstances the supply of water tankers to the petitioner will be reduced to half of present supply. Petitioner expressed satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition. In view of the above, petition stands disposed of in the terms stated above. JUDGE JUDGE *Sajjad*
